current.note: No live brand-site landing for day14-realty yet — variants below are first-pass options for when the site lands. Voice derived from REALTY-ADVANCEMENT-PLAN.md + REALTY-LAUNCH-RUNBOOK.md (operator voice, county-data-grounded, no opinions).

voice_notes: Operator voice — real records, not vibes.
Specific to SW Florida county feeds (Collier, Lee, Charlotte, Sarasota, Manatee).
Lean on the hourly scout + transparent deal score, not on hype.
No 'find your dream home' / no broker theatre.

headline_variants.headline: Southwest Florida deal flow, scored from real county data.
headline_variants.rationale: Geography + data-source + scoring in one line. Anchors the brand in its actual moat.

headline_variants.headline: Every parcel in five counties, ranked the moment it moves.
headline_variants.rationale: Foregrounds coverage + cadence — the hourly scout's two real differentiators.

headline_variants.headline: The deals are hiding in the records. We score them hourly.
headline_variants.rationale: Plain-spoken hook with a clear claim. Pairs the operator voice with the hourly cadence.

subhead_variants.subhead: Day14 Realty pulls fresh county records and AVM rents across Collier, Lee, Charlotte, Sarasota, and Manatee — then scores every parcel against a real investor model, hour by hour.
subhead_variants.rationale: Names the counties + the data sources + the model. Most concrete option.

subhead_variants.subhead: An hourly scout reads every SW Florida county feed, runs a transparent deal score, and surfaces the parcels that actually pencil. No MLS guessing, no junk leads.
subhead_variants.rationale: Leads with the mechanism, ends on two anti-positions that mirror the day14 core voice.

subhead_variants.subhead: Real records, real AVMs, a transparent deal score. Day14 Realty does the parcel-by-parcel work so the only thing left is the conversation with the seller.
subhead_variants.rationale: Triple-beat opener mirrors the headline structure of the day14 core site. Ends on the operator deliverable.
